title: olearia polita
intro: Olearia polita, also known as Mountain Daisy or New Zealand Flax-leaved Daisy, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Olearia polita include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Olearia polita can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in topical applications and creams.
